title: Test the Organizational Incident Response Capability
description: test the organizational incident response capability

checks.name: The Incident Response Capability is Tested
checks.purpose: Testing of the incident response capability via tabletop exercises, simulations, or live drills is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The Incident Response Capability is Tested
checks.purpose: Testing of the incident response capability is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: The Incident Response Capability is Tested
checks.purpose: Testing of the incident response capability is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: The Incident Response Capability is Tested
checks.purpose: Testing of the incident response capability is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Conduct and document periodic incident response capability tests such as tabletop exercises, functional drills, or full-scale simulations. Record test results, lessons learned, and any updates made to the incident response plan as a result of testing.
